chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1323 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Fresh Case 1. For order on Misc. No.6698/2025 (Urgent App) 2. For order on office objection No.1 to 6 3. For order on Misc. No.6699/2025 (Exemption/App) 4. For order on Misc. No.6700/2025 (Stay/App) 5. For order on Misc. No.6701/2025 (U/O 32/App) 6. For hearing of main case. 28-03-2025 Mr. Syed Ehsan, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2, 4 & 5 Prima facie the relief sought is against private respondent and the same is not contemplated per Article 199 of the Constitution. Even otherwise learned counsel states that the recourse has been sought before the concerned forums, therefore, parallel invocation of the writ jurisdiction appears unmerited. Petition is found to be misconceived and dismissed in limine along with pending applications. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
